---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

How would the feature work? What is the smallest viable form?

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you settle on the proposed one?

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots (related papers, prior PRs, canonical helpers this would compose with).
